name.ja: <ruby>剣鬼<rt>アシュトラ</rt></ruby>の<ruby>神<rt>しん</rt></ruby><ruby>域<rt>いき</rt></ruby>

text.en:
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Special Summon this card as a Normal Monster (Aqua/Tuner/DARK/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0) (this card is NOT treated as a Trap), then immediately after this effect resolves, you can Synchro Summon 1 Synchro Monster.
● When your opponent activates a Spell/Trap Card or effect and they control no face-down cards: Negate that effect.
You can only activate 1 "Asutra Divine Domain" per turn.
